spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: RESET_slave_nSRST
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Reset of the JTAG/SW part of the CoreSight DP.

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_master_CTIEXPOUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host CTI Channel Out Expansion interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_slave_CTIEXPIN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host CTI Channel In Expansion interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: SystemTimer_slave_REFCLK
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host System REFCLK Generic Timestamp Binary interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: SystemTimerGray_master_REFCLK
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host System REFCLK Generic Timestamp Gray interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: SystemTimer_slave_S32KCLK
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host System S32K Timestamp Binary interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: SystemTimerGray_master_S32KCLK
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Host System S32K Timestamp Gray interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_es0se0
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Sender frame of Secure Enclave to External System 0 MHU 0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_sees00
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Receiver frame of Secure Enclave to External System 0 MHU 0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_es0se1
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Sender frame of External System 0 to Secure Enclave MHU 1

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_sees01
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Receiver frame of Secure Enclave to External System 0 MHU 1

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_master_es0_cti
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: External System 0 CTI Channel Out interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_slave_es0_cti
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: External System 0 CTI Channel In interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_es1se0
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Sender frame of Secure Enclave to External System 1 MHU 0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_sees10
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Receiver frame of Secure Enclave to External System 1 MHU 0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_es1se1
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Sender frame of External System 1 to Secure Enclave MHU 1

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: interrupt_Master_sees11
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Combined interrupt output from Receiver frame of Secure Enclave to External System 1 MHU 1

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_master_es1_cti
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: External System 1 CTI Channel Out interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: ChannelPulse_slave_es1_cti
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: External System 1 CTI Channel In interface

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles. (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles. (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_CLKEN_DLY_CFG_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_RST_DLY_CFG_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: RST_HWSTAT_DLY_CFG_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_ISO_DLY_CFG_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_RST_DLY_CFG_DBG
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: DBGTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles. (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_CLKEN_DLY_CFG_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_RST_DLY_CFG_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: RST_HWSTAT_DLY_CFG_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_ISO_DLY_CFG_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_RST_DLY_CFG_SYS
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SYSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles. (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_CLKEN_DLY_CFG_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_RST_DLY_CFG_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_ISO_DLY_CFG_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_RST_DLY_CFG_SECENC
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: SECENCTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_FWRAM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: FWRAM PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: FWRAM PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_FWRAM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: FWRAM PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: FWRAM PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_CLKEN_DLY_CFG_FWRAM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: RST_HWSTAT_DLY_CFG_FWRAM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Sets the default value of the software-programmable FW PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clk cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CLUSTOP PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CLUSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CLUSTOP PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE3 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE3 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_CLKEN_DLY_CFG_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.ISO_CLKEN_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_RST_DLY_CFG_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: RST_HWSTAT_DLY_CFG_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.RST_HWSTAT_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLKEN_ISO_DLY_CFG_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.CLKEN_ISO_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_RST_DLY_CFG_CPU2
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE2 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: DEV_PREQ_DLY_CPU1
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE1 PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE1 PPU - Sets the delay between dev_pstate_o and dev_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles (valid range: 0-3)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: PCSM_PREQ_DLY_CPU1
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE1 PPU - Sets the delay between pcsm_pstate_o and pcsm_preq_o, in PPU clock cycles.

The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal. (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE1 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR0.CLKEN_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The CLKEN_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of a clock enable signal and the de-assertion of a device reset signal.

The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal.

The RST_HWSTAT_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a device reset signal and a transition of the ppuhwstat_o[20:0] signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE1 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

The ISO_CLKEN_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a clock enable signal.

The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal.

The CLKEN_ISO_DLY value controls the delay between the de-assertion of a clock enable signal and the assertion of an isolation enable signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: ISO_RST_DLY_CFG_CPU0
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CORE0 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CORE0 PPU - Sets the default value of the software-programmable PPU_DCDR1.ISO_RST_DLY register field, in PPU clock cycles. The ISO_RST_DLY value controls the delay between the assertion of an isolation enable signal and the assertion of a device reset signal (valid range: 0-255)

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: EXT_SYS0_ROM_ENTRY
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CoreSight ROM Table entry in the EXTDBG ROM to point to the External System 0 debug logic. This can be an entry to a CoreSight ROM table or a single debug component. If no debug logic is included in the External System this must be set to 0x0000_0000.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CoreSight ROM Table entry in the EXTDBG ROM to point to the External System 0 debug logic. This can be an entry to a CoreSight ROM table or a single debug component. If no debug logic is included in the External System this must be set to 0x0000_0000.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: MHU_HES00_NUM_CH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of Channels supported on HES0 0 MHU

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Number of Channels supported on HES0 0 MHU

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: MHU_ES0H0_NUM_CH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of Channels supported on ES0H 0 MHU

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Number of Channels supported on ES0H 0 MHU

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of Channels supported on HES0 1 MHU

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of Channels supported by SEES1 0 MHU

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: MHU_ES1SE0_NUM_CH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: MHU_ES1SE1_NUM_CH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of Channels supported by ES1SE 1 MHU

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Number of Channels supported by ES1SE 1 MHU

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: HOST_EXP_ROM_ENTRY
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: CoreSight ROM table entry in the Host ROM table to point to expansion debug logic. This can be an entry to another CoreSight ROM table or a single debug component. If no debug logic is added to the Host System this must be set to 0x0000_0000.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: CoreSight ROM table entry in the Host ROM table to point to expansion debug logic. This can be an entry to another CoreSight ROM table or a single debug component. If no debug logic is added to the Host System this must be set to 0x0000_0000.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: SOC_RST_DLY
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Number of S32KCLK cycles the Reset Controller uses uses to allow resets to propagate: 1 - 1 S32KCLK cycle. 2 - 2 S32KCLK cycle. ... 7 - 7 S32KCLK cycle. This value must be long enough to guarantee that all logic within the SoC has been reset.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Number of S32KCLK cycles the Reset Controller uses uses to allow resets to propagate: 1 - 1 S32KCLK cycle. 2 - 2 S32KCLK cycle. ... 7 - 7 S32KCLK cycle. This value must be long enough to guarantee that all logic within the SoC has been reset

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CLUSTOP_CORE_RST_DLY
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: The number of HOSTCPUCLKOUT clock cycles delay for CLUSTOP and CORE domain resets,and the number of GICCLK clock cycles delay for GIC-400.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: The number of HOSTCPUCLKOUT clock cycles delay for CLUSTOP and CORE domain resets,and the number of GICCLK clock cycles delay for GIC-400

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: FW2SYSTOP_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI 4 Stream Channels on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the System Control and the Base System.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI 4 Stream Channels on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the System Control and the Base System

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: FW2DBGTOP_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI 4 Stream Channels on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Debug Subsystem and the Base System.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI 4 Stream Channels on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Debug Subsystem and the Base System

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CPU_AW_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AW Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AW Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CPU_W_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI W Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CPU_AR_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AR Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AR Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CPU_R_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI R Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the Host CPU and the Base System.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: GIC_AW_FIFO_DEPTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AW Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the GIC-400 and the Base System.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Depth of the FIFO for the AXI AW Channel on the Asynchronous Domain Bridge between the GIC-400 and the Base System

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: GIC_W_FIFO_DEPTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: IIDR_PRODUCT_ID
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED product ID of the SSE-710 Subsystem.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED product ID of the SSE-710 Subsystem

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: IIDR_VARIANT_ID
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED value variant or major revision of the SSE-710 Subsystem.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED value variant or major revision of the SSE-710 Subsystem

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: IIDR_REVISION
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED value used to distinguish minor revisions of the SSE-710 Subsystem.

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: IMPLEMENTATION DEFINED value used to distinguish minor revisions of the SSE-710 Subsystem

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: IIDR_IMPLEMENTER
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Contains the JEP106 code of the company that implemented the SSE-710 Subsystem: - [11:8] JEP106 continuation code of implementer. - [7] Always 0. - [6:0] JEP106 identity code of implementer

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Contains the JEP106 code of the company that implemented the SSE-710 Subsystem: - [11:8] JEP106 continuation code of implementer. - [7] Always 0. - [6:0] JEP106 identity code of implementer

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CAAON2CA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of the interface between the Crypto Accelerator AON to Crypto Accelerator part

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Width of the interface between the Crypto Accelerator AON to Crypto Accelerator part

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: CA2CAAON_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of the interface between the Crypto Accelerator to Crypto Accelerator AON part

spirit:value.spirit:prompt: Width of the interface between the Crypto Accelerator to Crypto Accelerator AON part

spirit:fileSet.spirit:name: top_sse710_r0_aontop_synth_RTL
spirit:fileSet.spirit:description: This fileset describes the synthesizable RTL source files for this component
